summary: Applied two surgical opening edits to strengthen continuity from chapter 5 and reduce structural echo with chapter 7's manuscript-focused opening.
edits: Reframed the opening paragraph so it picks up Gavin's decision not to bring the manuscript back into the Great Hall, tightening the handoff from chapter 5.
Removed the repeated fixed-duration opening beat to avoid a redundant and potentially conflicting 'three days' echo against chapter 7.
